name: Olive Garden Pasta Fagioli
recipeIngredient: 2 cans sliced style stewed tomatoes (14 oz each)
1 lb jar of Prego spaghetti sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
2. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low.
3. Cover the pan and allow it to cook gently for 30 minutes or until the pasta is tender.
